name: kubeleash
description: Kubernetes MCP server with RBAC-style, context-scoped guardrails for AI agents.

policy_path.title: Policy file
policy_path.description: Path to your kubeleash policy. Defaults to ~/.kubeleash/policy.yaml; if no file exists there, a read-only starter policy (get/list/watch, deny exec/delete) is created on first run. Review and widen it to grant more access — kubeleash is default-deny.

kubeconfig_path.title: Kubeconfig file
kubeconfig_path.description: Path to the kubeconfig kubeleash should use. Defaults to ~/.kube/config.
